name: Silicon Craft Technology Public Company Limited
summary: Silicon Craft Technology Public Company Limited, an integrated circuit (IC) design company, designs, markets, and sells microchips for RFID applications. It offers linear and mixed-signal ICs; microchips for access and immobilizer systems, livestock identification tags, near field communications, and access control and interrogator or reader systems; and high and low frequency transponder ICs. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
